A drawer on the side of the terminal slides open, revealing a small, thin needle.

<color_light_green> @User > _
&You place your hand on the terminal.  There is a pinch, then a wet, mechanical hiss, as the needle draws a bit of blood.  Your vision blurs.

dynamic_line:
&<color_light_green> @User > update -help
</color> update: update
   Search for and prepare updates for the К°бө’бөҗбөү.
   If a useful update is available, AltarOS will download the update or make a route to the cache, making it possible for бҙҙбөҒбҙ№бҙ¬бҙә to access the update package.
   Your system obelisk will provide instructions on site.
